title: Super Mario World
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1990/1991 SNES design; genre evidence from archived 3DS Virtual Console product page (data-genre Action), observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Cape flight and Yoshi mounts retime platform routes across a branching, secret-exit world map.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One movement kit plus mount and cape modifiers open alternate exits without new level grammars.
exemplar_rationale: Exemplifies surplus pathing in an authored platform campaign via movement modifiers.

evidence.claim: Archived Nintendo 3DS Virtual Console product page listed data-genre as: Action.
